tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are heading out to Echo, but I have a midterm tomorrow morning and am only 60% through my review.
I declined Mina's invitation to study for my midterm, which is due tomorrow morning and only 60% complete.
I've made significant progress on my midterm review, reaching 78% completion, and correctly chose to skip the club outing to prioritize studying.
I slept 8 hours with no sleep debt, leaving my energy at full capacity for the midterm tomorrow.
I have finished my midterm review just as the exam begins, and I am fully rested with high energy to start.
I joined the social club, and the group welcomed me warmly. This adds a positive social interaction to my day after finishing midterm review.

agent.last_reasoning: The club event (g2) is resolved and the exam deadline (g1) has passed. With no urgent tasks remaining, sleeping recovers energy for the next day without risking missed deadlines.
